column1: # Most verbs are handled by dynamic analysis.
# - Compound verbs with 促音 (break without dict)
# --- Godan-SA verbs (disambiguation: verb renyokei vs adjective stem) ---
# e.g., 話しそう (verb) vs 難しそう (adj) - both have kanji + し + そう structure
# --- Compound verbs with 促音 (break without dict) ---
# GODAN_MA: Renyokei ~み competes with auxiliary みたい (resemblance).
# All single-kanji+む verbs must be enumerated here — without a dict entry,
# 猫みたい cannot be distinguished from 読みたい.
# いう needed for Xという patterns
# 付ける - split as 付+ける without dict
# --- Common Godan-RA verbs (needed for passive/potential conjugation expansion) ---
